title: PostalRecord
description: A single postal-code reference record as published by PostalCodes.info. Postal codes are always strings.

postal_code.description: Postal identifier as text. May contain leading zeroes, spaces, letters or punctuation.

place_name.description: Locality, town, or city name associated with the postal code.

admin_name1.description: First-level administrative subdivision (state, region, autonomous community).

latitude.description: WGS84 locality or area centroid latitude. Not a delivery-point coordinate.

longitude.description: WGS84 locality or area centroid longitude. Not a delivery-point coordinate.
